---
title: "Analysis"
author: "Laura Lu, Iris Shih, Brandon Moore"
date: 2026-03-19
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
error: true
editor: visual
---

## Packages Used

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
